title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2025
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2025
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 06 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 07/01/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to decline. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 751.5 yuan/mt, down 2.21% for the day.Traders showed a relatively weak willingness to sell. Steel mills were cautious in purchasing, opting to purchase as needed.
